user.description: How would you like to select SmogTok station?

menu_options.station_geolocation: Find SmogTok station near your location (recommended)
menu_options.station_list: Pick SmogTok station from the list

menu_option_descriptions.station_geolocation: List of active SmogTok stations within {nearby_radius} kilometers radius
menu_option_descriptions.station_list: List of active SmogTok stations in alphabetical order
menu_option_descriptions.station_id: Provide ID of a SmogTok station

station_geolocation.description:
If you don't see your station, it may not be active anymore or it may be a new station. In that case, you can try to enter station ID manually (open integration setup again).
You can go to [Settings -> Areas, labels & zones -> Zones](/config/zone) and adjust your home location.

data_description.smogtok_station: List of {station_number} SmogTok stations active in the last 30 days within {nearby_radius} kilometers radius from the nearest one.

station_list.description: If you don't see your station, it may not be active anymore or it may be a new station. In that case, you can try to enter station ID manually (open integration setup again).

data_description.smogtok_station: List of SmogTok stations active in the last 30 days in alphabetical order.

data_description.id: Enter SmogTok station ID to configure.

error.invalid_response: Invalid API response from the server
error.no_data_available: No data available for selected station

abort.invalid_response: Invalid API response from the server
abort.no_data_available: No data available for selected station
